technology.title: Meet He Tingbo: Huawei’s ‘chip queen’ trying to rewrite China’s semiconductor playbook
technology.summary: When He Tingbo took the stage in Shanghai this week to unveil Huawei Technologies’ Tau (τ) Scaling Law, the message was about more than a new chip development framework. It was also a statement, showing how the most prominent Chinese technology company to have been subjected to US sanctions wants to compete in semiconductors when access to the world’s most advanced chipmaking tools remains restricted, and when the industry’s decades-old reliance on shrinking transistors is becoming more...

briefing.news_focus: When He Tingbo took the stage in Shanghai this week to unveil Huawei Technologies’ Tau (τ) Scaling Law, the message was about more than a new chip development framework. It was also a statement, showing how the most prominent Chinese technology company to have been subjected to US sanctions wants to compete in semiconductors when access to the world’s most advanced chipmaking tools remains restricted, and when the industry’s decades-old reliance on shrinking transistors is becoming more...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 華為科技的何婷波在上海發表了Tau (τ) Scaling Law，這不僅是新晶片開發框架的介紹，更是華為在面對美國制裁下，尋求在半導體領域競爭的宣言。此舉顯示出華為希望在全球最先進的晶片製造工具受限的情況下，重新定義中國的半導體策略，並挑戰行業對於縮小晶體管的長期依賴。
briefing.background: 近年來，中美之間的科技競爭加劇，特別是在半導體領域。美國對中國企業的制裁使得華為等公司在獲取先進製造技術方面面臨重大挑戰。半導體產業長期以來依賴於縮小晶體管以提升性能，但隨著技術瓶頸的出現，業界正尋求新的發展路徑。華為作為中國最大的科技公司之一，正試圖在這一背景下，通過創新來突破技術限制，並重塑自身在全球半導體市場的地位。
briefing.analysis: 何婷波的發表標誌著華為在半導體領域的戰略轉型，顯示出其在面對外部壓力下的應對能力。華為的Tau Scaling Law可能會成為未來晶片設計的重要參考，尤其是在美國限制高端技術出口的情況下，這一策略的成功與否將直接影響中國半導體產業的發展。此外，這也可能引發其他中國科技企業的跟進，進一步加劇中美科技競爭的局勢。儘管目前尚未有其他報導提供補充細節，但華為的這一舉動無疑將成為業界關注的焦點，並可能改變全球半導體市場的格局。

technology.title: Japan enacts law centralising intelligence gathering amid privacy fears
technology.summary: Japan’s parliament enacted a law on Wednesday to establish a new National Intelligence Council to centralise information gathering in response to overseas threats, marking a first step in plans to boost capabilities that have raised concerns over civil liberties. Establishing the council is a key aim in the governing agenda of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, a security hawk who has pledged to strengthen intelligence and counter-espionage capabilities in response to what her government calls the...

briefing.news_focus: Japan’s parliament enacted a law on Wednesday to establish a new National Intelligence Council to centralise information gathering in response to overseas threats, marking a first step in plans to boost capabilities that have raised concerns over civil liberties. Establishing the council is a key aim in the governing agenda of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, a security hawk who has pledged to strengthen intelligence and counter-espionage capabilities in response to what her government calls the...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 日本國會於週三通過一項新法，成立國家情報委員會，以集中情報收集，應對海外威脅。這是首相高市早苗政府計劃加強情報及反間諜能力的第一步，但也引發了對公民自由的擔憂。
briefing.background: 日本在面對地緣政治緊張局勢及安全威脅的背景下，政府決定強化國內的情報收集能力。高市早苗作為安全政策的支持者，推動此法案以應對來自外部的潛在威脅，特別是來自鄰近國家的間諜活動。此舉反映了日本在安全政策上的轉變，尤其是在國際局勢變化及國內對安全問題的關注日益增加的情況下。政府的這一行動也引發了對個人隱私及公民自由的擔憂，因為集中情報收集可能會導致監控的擴大。
briefing.analysis: 新成立的國家情報委員會旨在提升日本的情報能力，這一政策受到政府內部安全觀念的推動。然而，這也引發了社會各界的擔憂，特別是在隱私權和公民自由方面。反對者擔心，這樣的集中化可能導致濫用權力，並對普通公民的生活造成影響。支持者則認為，隨著國際安全環境的變化，強化情報能力是必要的。未來，政府如何平衡安全需求與公民自由之間的矛盾將成為關鍵挑戰，並可能影響公眾對政府的信任。

technology.title: AI is massively increasing China’s new weapon development speed: scientists
technology.summary: While much of military AI globally focuses on autonomous weapons and large language models, a new study suggests Beijing may also be pursuing a quieter transformation: embedding artificial intelligence (AI) in the deepest layers of industrial manufacturing. A study published last month in the Chinese defence engineering journal Acta Armamentarii described how researchers developed an AI-powered “bearing design agent” – capable of autonomously designing rolling bearings in advanced machinery. The...

briefing.news_focus: While much of military AI globally focuses on autonomous weapons and large language models, a new study suggests Beijing may also be pursuing a quieter transformation: embedding artificial intelligence (AI) in the deepest layers of industrial manufacturing. A study published last month in the Chinese defence engineering journal Acta Armamentarii described how researchers developed an AI-powered “bearing design agent” – capable of autonomously designing rolling bearings in advanced machinery. The...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國科學家發表的一項研究指出，人工智慧（AI）正在顯著加速中國新武器的開發速度。這項研究發表在中國國防工程期刊《武器學報》中，介紹了一種名為“軸承設計代理”的AI技術，該技術能夠自動設計先進機械中的滾動軸承，顯示出AI在工業製造深層次的應用潛力。
briefing.background: 隨著全球對軍事AI的關注日益增加，許多國家專注於自主武器和大型語言模型的開發。然而，中國在這一領域的發展似乎更加多元化，尤其是在工業製造方面。中國政府在過去幾年中大力推進科技創新，尤其是在國防工業，期望通過引入AI技術來提升武器系統的性能和生產效率。這一策略不僅能夠加快武器的研發速度，還可能改變未來戰爭的形態。
briefing.analysis: 這項研究顯示了中國在軍事AI領域的潛在優勢，尤其是在工業製造的深層應用上。通過自動化設計，可能使得武器系統的開發更為高效，從而提升中國的軍事能力。此舉可能引發其他國家，特別是美國和俄羅斯的關注，因為他們也在積極探索AI在軍事上的應用。不同於傳統的自主武器開發，中國的這一策略可能會使其在未來的軍備競賽中占據先機。此外，這也可能引發對於軍事AI倫理和安全的討論，特別是在自動化系統的可靠性和控制問題上。

politics.title: Labour must put policy first, politics second, Tony Blair says
politics.summary: Former PM urges party to take a step back and ‘analyse the world’ amid speculation over Keir Starmer’s leadership UK politics live – latest updates Tony Blair has continued his attack on the Labour government, saying it should be about “policy first, politics second”. Hours after he published a scathing essay in which he warned that the party’s “almost infinite capacity for self-delusion” meant it was likely to lose the next election, the former prime minister said it should “take a step back, analyse the world”. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Former PM urges party to take a step back and ‘analyse the world’ amid speculation over Keir Starmer’s leadership UK politics live – latest updates Tony Blair has continued his attack on the Labour government, saying it should be about “policy first, politics second”. Hours after he published a scathing essay in which he warned that the party’s “almost infinite capacity for self-delusion” meant it was likely to lose the next election, the former prime minister said it should “take a step back, analyse the world”. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 前英國首相托尼·布萊爾呼籲工黨應將政策置於政治之上，並在對基爾·斯塔默領導的猜測中，強調工黨應該退一步分析當前世界。他在一篇尖銳的文章中警告，工黨的自我迷失能力幾乎是無限的，這可能導致他們在即將到來的選舉中失利。
briefing.background: 英國工黨目前面臨內部挑戰，尤其是在領導層的穩定性與政策方向上。基爾·斯塔默自接任以來，致力於重塑工黨形象，試圖擺脫過去的陰影。然而，內部對於政策的共識與選民的期待之間存在著明顯的落差。布萊爾的評論反映出對工黨未來的擔憂，尤其是在即將舉行的選舉中，工黨需重新聚焦於政策制定，以贏得選民的信任。
briefing.analysis: 布萊爾的言論突顯了工黨內部對於政策與政治優先順序的分歧。他的建議反映出對當前領導層的批評，認為工黨過於專注於政治策略，而忽視了實質政策的制定。這種觀點在黨內可能引發不同的反應，支持者可能認為這是必要的自我反省，而反對者則可能視其為對現任領導的挑戰。隨著選舉的臨近，工黨必須在政策與政治之間找到平衡，以避免重蹈覆轍。布萊爾的警告若未被重視，可能使工黨在選舉中面臨更大的困難。

politics.title: China supports 'active mediation' by Pakistan between U.S.-Iran, says Foreign Minister Wang Yi
politics.summary: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi’s remarks came as U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham said in a post on X that Pakistan, as a ‘mediator’ between the U.S. and Iran, is more than ‘problematic’

briefing.news_focus: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi’s remarks came as U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham said in a post on X that Pakistan, as a ‘mediator’ between the U.S. and Iran, is more than ‘problematic’
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國外交部長王毅表示，中國支持巴基斯坦在美國與伊朗之間進行'積極調解'的角色。此言論發表之際，美國參議員林賽·格雷厄姆在社交媒體上指出，巴基斯坦作為美伊之間的'調解者'是相當'有問題'的，顯示出對巴基斯坦調解能力的質疑。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係持續升高，尤其是在核協議及地區影響力的問題上。巴基斯坦在此背景下，試圖扮演調解者的角色，這不僅是出於其地緣政治考量，也可能與其與中國的經濟合作有關。中國與巴基斯坦的經濟走廊計劃旨在加強雙邊貿易與投資，並可能使巴基斯坦在國際事務中獲得更大的發言權。
briefing.analysis: 王毅的言論顯示出中國對巴基斯坦的支持，可能是希望透過巴基斯坦來影響美伊關係，進而增強自身在該地區的影響力。然而，格雷厄姆的批評反映出美方對巴基斯坦調解能力的懷疑，可能會影響巴基斯坦在國際舞台上的角色。參考報導提到的中巴經濟走廊計劃，可能使巴基斯坦在調解過程中更具主動性，但同時也可能使其面臨更大的國際壓力。未來，巴基斯坦如何平衡中美之間的關係將成為關鍵。

supporting_titles: China, Pakistan aiming to revamp economic corridor

politics.title: Blair says Labour needs debate before selecting new leader as he criticises Burnham speech – UK politics live
politics.summary: Ex-PM uses 5,700-word essay to accuse Starmer, Burnham and Streeting of putting Labour’s future at risk Tony Blair tells Starmer and rivals: abandon net zero and move closer to Trump Zack Polanski , the Green party leader, posted this on social media about Tony Blair’s latest intervention this morning. Tony Blair. What the billionaire class have paid for. Spot the difference between “Tony Blair says” and “Nigel Farage says” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Ex-PM uses 5,700-word essay to accuse Starmer, Burnham and Streeting of putting Labour’s future at risk Tony Blair tells Starmer and rivals: abandon net zero and move closer to Trump Zack Polanski , the Green party leader, posted this on social media about Tony Blair’s latest intervention this morning. Tony Blair. What the billionaire class have paid for. Spot the difference between “Tony Blair says” and “Nigel Farage says” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 前英國首相托尼·布萊爾在一篇5700字的文章中批評工黨領袖基爾·斯塔默及其競爭者安迪·伯納姆和韋斯·斯特丁，指責他們危害工黨的未來。他呼籲工黨放棄淨零排放政策，並向唐納德·特朗普靠攏，警告如果繼續偏離中間路線，工黨將可能在下一次選舉中失利。
briefing.background: 工黨在英國政治中長期扮演重要角色，但近年來面臨內部分歧與選民支持度下降的挑戰。布萊爾的批評反映出對工黨未來方向的擔憂，特別是在氣候政策與經濟政策上。隨著選舉臨近，工黨內部對於如何平衡環保政策與經濟增長的辯論愈發激烈。布萊爾的言論也突顯出他對於當前領導層的失望，並希望能夠引發更深入的討論，以避免重蹈覆轍。
briefing.analysis: 布萊爾的介入引發了對工黨未來方向的廣泛討論。他的批評指出，工黨若繼續偏離中間路線，將面臨選舉失利的風險。這一觀點與當前工黨領導層的政策形成對比，斯塔默及其支持者可能會堅持其環保承諾，認為這是吸引年輕選民的關鍵。然而，布萊爾的建議，特別是放棄淨零排放政策，可能會引發黨內的激烈反對，尤其是來自綠黨及環保派的壓力。參考報導中提到，布萊爾的批評被認為不具建設性，這反映出他與當前工黨領導層之間的深刻分歧。未來，工黨如何平衡內部意見並制定有效的選舉策略將是關鍵。

supporting_titles: Tony Blair tells Starmer and rivals: abandon net zero and move closer to Trump
supporting_summaries: In highly unusual intervention, ex-PM says his party’s ‘almost infinite capacity for self-delusion’ makes it likely to lose next election Analysis: Tony Blair’s essay on Labour failings gets full marks for being unhelpful Tony Blair has accused Keir Starmer, Andy Burnham and Wes Streeting of putting Labour’s future at risk by abandoning the centre ground, warning that the party’s “almost infinite capacity for self-delusion” means it is likely to lose the next election. In a scathing 5,700-word attack on the prime minister and his would-be successors published on Tuesday night, Blair argued for the government to crack down on welfare spending, abandon restrictions on oil and gas and smooth relations with Donald Trump. Continue reading...

economy.title: The Guardian view on Britain’s economy: to profit politically a recovery must be felt in people’s pockets | Editorial
economy.summary: The chancellor can point to growth and lower inflation, but weak job data, flat living standards and uncertain productivity are no reason to cheer In October 1991, the then chancellor Norman Lamont said he thought he saw some “green shoots” of recovery. He was ridiculed, as Britain was in the midst of a deep recession that it would not clamber out of until the following summer. Insouciant in the face of the scorn heaped upon him, Mr Lamont defended himself robustly, even long after the event – not least by writing letters to this newspaper. Despite this valiant defence, “green shootism” became notorious because it suggested a ruling class that was congratulating itself well before ordinary people felt a recovery. This has not stopped politicians since 2010 from claiming that Britain was bouncing back from the series of shocks it has experienced. After austerity had produced economic stagnation, George Osborne, the Tory chancellor in 2013, seized on a few quarters of growth to claim Britain was “turning a corner ”. Just months before the 2024 general election, Rishi Sunak, the Conservative prime minister, said that the country was starting to see the “ green shoots ” of recovery. Voters resoundingly rejected that claim when Labour was elected in a landslide. Do you have an opinion on the issues raised in this article? If you would like to submit a response of up to 300 words by email to be considered for publication in our letters section, please click here . Continue reading...

He was ridiculed, as Britain was in the midst of a deep recession that it would not clamber out of until the following summer. Insouciant in the face of the scorn heaped upon him, Mr Lamont defended himself robustly, even long after the event – not least by writing letters to this newspaper. Despite this valiant defence, “green shootism” became notorious because it suggested a ruling class that was congratulating itself well before ordinary people felt a recovery. This has not stopped politicians since 2010 from claiming that Britain was bouncing back from the series of shocks it has experienced. After austerity had produced economic stagnation, George Osborne, the Tory chancellor in 2013, seized on a few quarters of growth to claim Britain was “turning a corner ”. Just months before the 2024 general election, Rishi Sunak, the Conservative prime minister, said that the country was starting to see the “ green shoots ” of recovery. Voters resoundingly rejected that claim when Labour was elected in a landslide. Do you have an opinion on the issues raised in this article? briefing.news_focus_zh: 《衛報》社論指出，儘管英國財相宣稱經濟增長和通脹下降，但實際上就業數據疲弱、生活水平平穩及生產力不確定，並無理由慶祝。歷史上，政治人物曾多次在經濟復甦未明顯體現在民眾生活中時，宣稱出現復甦的「綠芽」，這種情況在即將到來的2024年大選前再次出現，當前的保守黨政府面臨著選民的懷疑與拒絕。
briefing.background: 英國經濟在過去幾年遭遇多重衝擊，包括脫歐後的市場不確定性及疫情影響，導致經濟增長緩慢及生活成本上升。儘管政府在某些指標上顯示出增長，但民眾的實際感受卻未能跟上，生活水平的停滯使得選民對政府的經濟政策產生懷疑。面對即將到來的選舉，政黨間的經濟表現競爭愈發激烈，尤其是工黨對保守黨的經濟管理提出質疑，強調民眾的實際利益。
briefing.analysis: 《衛報》的社論強調了政治與經濟之間的緊張關係，指出即使有經濟增長的數據，若無法轉化為民眾的實際收益，政府的聲明將難以獲得民眾支持。這與《經濟學人》的報導相呼應，後者提到政治因素對中央銀行的影響，暗示公共對高通脹的耐受度可能會影響政策決策。隨著2024年大選的臨近，保守黨若無法有效改善民生，可能面臨選民的強烈反彈，這將影響其未來的政策方向及選舉結果。

supporting_titles: It’s not just the Fed. Politics looms over central banks everywhere

economy.title: Energy price cap in Great Britain to rise by 13% from July
economy.summary: Average gas and electricity bill to jump to £1,862 a year from July until end of September, in part because of Iran war Business live – latest updates Households will face the steepest summer rise in energy charges in four years after months of soaring market prices caused the government’s energy price cap for Great Britain to climb by 13%. Under the cap the average gas and electricity bill will increase to the equivalent of £1,862 a year from July until the end of September to take account of the rise in global energy market prices caused by the war on Iran, up from £1,641 a year in April to June. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Average gas and electricity bill to jump to £1,862 a year from July until end of September, in part because of Iran war Business live – latest updates Households will face the steepest summer rise in energy charges in four years after months of soaring market prices caused the government’s energy price cap for Great Britain to climb by 13%. Under the cap the average gas and electricity bill will increase to the equivalent of £1,862 a year from July until the end of September to take account of the rise in global energy market prices caused by the war on Iran, up from £1,641 a year in April to June. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國的能源價格上限將於七月上調13%，使得家庭的平均燃氣和電力帳單從每年£1,641上升至£1,862，這是四年來夏季能源費用的最大漲幅。此次漲價是因為全球能源市場價格因伊朗戰爭而飆升，預計將持續至九月底。
briefing.background: 英國的能源價格上限制度旨在保護消費者免受市場波動的影響，然而，隨著全球能源需求的增加及地緣政治緊張局勢的升高，特別是伊朗戰爭的影響，市場價格持續上漲。這使得能源監管機構不得不調整價格上限，以反映實際成本。根據最新的市場數據，能源價格的上漲已對家庭經濟造成壓力，尤其是在通脹率高企的背景下，這一變化將進一步影響家庭的支出能力。
briefing.analysis: 此次能源價格上漲對家庭經濟造成直接影響，根據BBC的報導，使用典型能源的家庭每年需多支付£221。這一情況將使得許多家庭面臨更大的財務壓力，尤其是在通脹和生活成本上升的情況下。政府和能源監管機構的應對措施將成為關鍵，可能需要考慮進一步的補貼或支持措施來緩解家庭的負擔。此外，隨著市場價格的波動，未來幾個月內能源價格的走勢仍然不明朗，可能會影響到消費者信心及經濟增長。各方可能會在如何平衡市場需求與消費者保護之間展開激烈討論。

supporting_titles: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
supporting_summaries: A household using a typical amount of energy will pay £221 a year more, under the regulator's new price cap.

economy.title: Another ‘DeepSeek moment’? Huawei milestone alters China trajectory in chip race: analysts
economy.summary: Huawei Technologies’ unveiling of a chip architectural workaround to bypass US sanctions marks a major step towards China’s semiconductor self-sufficiency, giving Beijing powerful new leverage in its tech tug of war with Washington, analysts say. The Chinese tech giant captured global attention on Monday by introducing the new Tau (τ) Scaling Law, which it said lay the groundwork for Huawei to achieve transistor density equivalent to a 1.4-nanometre process in high-end chips by 2031. If proven,...

briefing.news_focus: Huawei Technologies’ unveiling of a chip architectural workaround to bypass US sanctions marks a major step towards China’s semiconductor self-sufficiency, giving Beijing powerful new leverage in its tech tug of war with Washington, analysts say. The Chinese tech giant captured global attention on Monday by introducing the new Tau (τ) Scaling Law, which it said lay the groundwork for Huawei to achieve transistor density equivalent to a 1.4-nanometre process in high-end chips by 2031. If proven,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 華為技術公司近日推出了一項新的晶片架構解決方案，旨在繞過美國的制裁，這被分析師視為中國在半導體自給自足方面的重要進展。華為在週一引起全球關注，介紹了新的Tau (τ) Scaling Law，該技術預計將使華為在2031年前實現相當於1.4納米工藝的高端晶片的晶體管密度。
briefing.background: 中國的半導體產業長期以來受到美國制裁的影響，這使得中國在高科技領域的發展受到限制。隨著全球對半導體需求的增加，中國政府已將半導體自給自足視為國家戰略的一部分。華為作為中國科技巨頭之一，其在晶片技術上的突破被認為是對抗美國技術壟斷的重要一步。此舉不僅可能改變中國的科技格局，也可能影響全球半導體市場的競爭態勢。
briefing.analysis: 華為的這一新技術可能會對中美科技競爭格局產生深遠影響。分析師指出，若華為能夠成功實現其預期的晶片技術，將使中國在半導體領域獲得更大的自主權，並可能減少對外部供應鏈的依賴。這一進展可能引發美國對中國科技公司的進一步制裁或限制，因為美方將視此為對其技術優勢的挑戰。此外，這也可能促使其他國家重新評估與中國的科技合作關係，特別是在半導體領域。整體而言，華為的突破可能會加劇中美之間的技術對抗，並改變全球科技生態系統的競爭格局。
